Sex.description: Sex distribution of patients in each treatment group, assessed for baseline comparability.

Age.description: Mean age (with SD) of patients in each treatment group, assessed for baseline comparability.

Duration_of_pain.description: Mean duration of pain in weeks (with SD) in each treatment group, assessed for baseline comparability.

Pain_score_at_presentation.description: Median pain score at presentation (visual analogue scale) with range in each treatment group. The answer identifies this as the notable baseline imbalance and notes it is also the outcome measure, suggesting analysis of change from baseline.

Radiological_abnormalities.description: Number (percentage) of patients with radiological abnormalities of the spine in each treatment group, assessed for baseline comparability.

Treatment_group.description: The three treatment groups being compared for baseline comparability.

Number_of_patients.description: Number of patients in each treatment group.
